latency_full_pipeline.hardware_note: Measured on x86 dev container; mobile-CPU latency will be higher but the ~1000x headroom vs the 100 ms budget absorbs it. Hardware-in-the-loop verification on a target Android device is a stated pre-pilot milestone.

verdict.headroom: model is 5,112x under the RAM bar; p95 latency is 126x under the latency bar
